translations.### iOS 完美實踐一次性優惠或試用的方法 (Swift)\n\n: ### Perfect Implementation of One-Time Offers or Trials on iOS (Swift)
translations.#### 1.首先登入 [開發者後台](https://developer.ap: #### 1. First, log in to the [Developer Portal](https://developer.apple.com/account/#/membership/){:target="_blank"} **and note your Team ID**
translations.#### 2. 再點側欄的 [Certificates, IDs & Profi: #### 2. Then click the sidebar's [Certificates, IDs & Profiles](https://developer.apple.com/account/ios/certificate/){:target="_blank"} to go to the certificate management platform
translations.#### 3. 依Apple規範組合 [JWT(JSON Web Token)]: #### 3. Assemble the [JWT (JSON Web Token)](https://yami.io/jwt/){:target="_blank"} format according to Apple’s specifications
translations.#### 4. 將資料發送給Apple伺服器＆取得回傳結果\n\n: #### 4. Send Data to Apple Server & Receive Response Results
translations.#### 5. 取得Apple伺服器回傳結果\n\n: #### 5. Get the Response from Apple Server
translations.#### 6. 後端API回傳結果給APP\n\n: #### 6. Backend API Returns Result to the APP
translations.#### 主要運作流程如下：\n\n: #### The main workflow is as follows:
translations.#### 與原本儲存方式比較：\n\n: #### Comparison with the original storage method:
translations.**DeviceCheck API 提供兩個操作：**\n**1.查詢儲存資料：:
**DeviceCheck API offers two operations:**
**1. Query stored data:** https://api.devicecheck.apple.com/v1/query_two_bits
translations.**允許開發者針對使用者的裝置進行識別標記**\n\n: **Allow developers to identify and mark users' devices**
translations.**同APNS推播有分開發環境跟正式環境：**\n1.開發環境：api.deve:
**Like APNS push notifications, there are separate development and production environments:**
1. Development environment: api.development.devicecheck.apple.com *(For some reason, my requests in the development environment always fail)*
2. Production environment: api.devicecheck.apple.com
translations.**回傳內容：無，回傳狀態 200 即表示寫入成功！**\n\n: **Response content: None, a 200 status code indicates a successful write!**
translations.*p.s. 你沒看錯，最後修改時間就只能顯示到年-月*\n\n: *p.s. You read it right, the last modified time can only show up to year-month*
translations.*p.s. 這邊小弟犧牲了自已的手機實際做了測試，結果吻合；就算我登出換iClo: *p.s. I personally tested this on my own phone, and the results matched; even after logging out and switching iCloud accounts, deleting all data, resetting all settings, and restoring to factory defaults, reinstalling the app still retrieved the value.*
translations.> **Allow developers to identify and mar: > **Allow developers to identify and mark users' devices**
translations.> ⚠ Please note *This is for testing dem: > ⚠ Please note *This is for testing demonstration only and is not recommended for production use* ⚠
translations.APP在針對相應的狀態做回應就完成了！\n\n: The app responds accordingly to the respective status, and it's done!
translations.DeviceCheck 雖然不能讓我們得到保證不會改變的UUID，但他能做到「: Although DeviceCheck does not guarantee an unchangeable UUID, it provides a **storage** function. Apple offers 2 bits of cloud storage per device, allowing read/write of those 2 bits by sending a temporary device-generated token to Apple.
translations.Finished.\n\n: Understood. Please provide the Markdown paragraphs you want me to translate into English.
translations.Step 1.建立新Key，勾選「DeviceCheck」\n\n: Step 1. Create a new Key and check "DeviceCheck"
translations.```json\n{\n \"bit0\": Int：2 bits 資料中第一:
```json
{
  "bit0": Int: The first bit of the 2 bits data: 0 or 1,
  "bit1": Int: The second bit of the 2 bits data: 0 or 1,
  "last_update_time": String: "Last update time YYYY-MM"
}
```
translations.```plaintext\n//Headers:\nAuthorization::
```plaintext
//Headers:
Authorization: Bearer xxxxxx.xxxxxx.xxxxxx (The composed JWT string)

//Content:
device_token:deviceToken (The device token to query)
transaction_id:UUID().uuidString (Query identifier, here using UUID as an example)
timestamp: Request timestamp (in milliseconds), note! This is in milliseconds (EX: 1556549164000)
```

```plaintext
//Headers:
Authorization: Bearer xxxxxx.xxxxxx.xxxxxx (The composed JWT string)

//Content:
device_token:deviceToken (The device token to query)
transaction_id:UUID().uuidString (Query identifier, here represented by a UUID)
timestamp: Request timestamp (in milliseconds), note! This is in milliseconds (e.g., 1556549164000)
bit0: The first bit of the 2 bits data: 0 or 1
bit1: The second bit of the 2 bits data: 0 or 1
```
translations.iOS APP 這邊透過DeviceCheck API產生一組識別裝置用的臨時T: The iOS APP generates a temporary device identification token using the DeviceCheck API and sends it to the backend. The backend then combines the developer's private key and developer information to create a JWT, which is sent to Apple's server. After receiving the response from Apple, the backend processes the data and returns it to the iOS APP.
translations.iOS DeviceCheck 跟著你到天涯海角\n\n: iOS DeviceCheck Goes With You to the Ends of the Earth
translations.⚠請注意 *僅為測試示範所需，不建議用於正式環境* ⚠\n\n: ⚠ Please note *This is for testing demonstration only and is not recommended for production use* ⚠
translations.✓ 表示資料還在\n\n: ✓ indicates the data is still available
translations.不需撰寫後端程式就能模擬執行所有內容．\n\n: You can simulate and execute all content without writing any backend code.
translations.了解完基本資訊後，讓我們開始動手做吧！\n\n: After understanding the basics, let's get started!
translations.再來就是將deviceToken發送到後端我們自己的API去處理．\n\n: Next, send the deviceToken to our own backend API for processing.
translations.取得組合的JWT字串：xxxxxx.xxxxxx.xxxxxx\n\n: Get the combined JWT string: xxxxxx.xxxxxx.xxxxxx
translations.只能組合出4種狀態，能做的功能有限．\n\n: Only four states can be combined, so the available functions are limited.
translations.因 **每個裝置只能存2 bits的資訊** ，所以能做的項目差不多就如官方所提: Since **each device can only store 2 bits of information**, the possible uses are limited to what the official documentation mentions, such as whether the device has been used for a trial, has made a payment, or is a blocked user, etc.; and only one item can be implemented.
translations.因後端部分我無法提供實作且不是大家都會PHP，這邊提供一個用純iOS (Swif: Since I cannot provide backend implementation and not everyone knows PHP, here is a pure iOS (Swift) example that handles the backend tasks (JWT creation, sending data to Apple) directly within the app for your reference!
translations.在寫上一篇 [Call Directory Extension](../ac55: While writing the previous [Call Directory Extension](../ac557047d206/), I accidentally discovered this lesser-known API. Although it's not new (announced at WWDC 2017 / supported on iOS ≥11) and quite simple to implement, I still did a small study and test, and compiled this article as a record.
translations.如流程所述，APP要做的只有取得臨時識別Token（ **deviceToken: As described in the process, the only thing the APP needs to do is obtain a temporary identification Token (**deviceToken**)!
translations.最後一步建立完成後， **記下 Key ID** 及點擊「Download」下載: After completing the final step, **note the Key ID** and click "Download" to save the privateKey.p8 private key file.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.自從 iOS ≥ 6 之後開發者無法取得使用者裝置的唯一識別符(UUID)，折衷: Since iOS ≥ 6, developers can no longer access the device's unique identifier (UUID). A workaround is to use IDFV combined with KeyChain (see [this article](../a4bc3bce7513/) for details), but the UUID will still reset when switching iCloud accounts or resetting the device. This cannot guarantee device uniqueness. If used for business logic storage and validation, such as first-time free trials, users may exploit this by frequently switching accounts or resetting the device to repeatedly access unlimited trials.
translations.這時候你已經準備齊全了所有推播所需資料：\n\n: At this point, you have prepared all the data needed for the push notification:
translations.這邊做的是一個一次性的優惠領取，每個裝置只能領一次！\n\n: This implements a one-time offer redemption; each device can only redeem once!
translations.這邊太久沒碰PHP了，有興趣請參考 [iOS11で追加されたDeviceChec: I haven't worked with PHP for a long time. If you're interested, please refer to the requestToken.php section in the article [iOS11で追加されたDeviceCheckについて](https://qiita.com/owen/items/85dff1e45083d2805140){:target="_blank"}.
translations.這邊要感謝 [Ethan Huang](https://medium.com/u: Here, I want to thank [Ethan Huang](https://medium.com/u/e13f6afcf9b9){:target="_blank"} for his great [CupertinoJWT](https://github.com/ethanhuang13/CupertinoJWT){:target="_blank"} library that supports generating JWT format content within iOS apps!
translations.選擇「Keys」-> 「All」-> 右上角「+」新增\n\n: Select "Keys" -> "All" -> "+" at the top right to add a new one
translations.重點在後端處理的部分\n\n: The key part is handled on the backend.
